title: taraxacum canophyllum
intro: Taraxacum canophyllum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its smaller size and fewer leaves compared to the common dandelion. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain inulin and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum canophyllum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum canophyllum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
